title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Tenders
text:
| Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| Notice Inviting Tender for (2nd call) regarding supply of Animal articles in Government managed temples for 1(One) year. | Notice Inviting Tender for (2nd call) regarding supply of Animal articles in Government managed temples for 1(One) year. | 02/07/2026 | 07/07/2026 | |
| NOTICE INVITING E-TENDER FOR SETTLEMENT OF RETAIL VEND OF SIX (06) NOS. NON-FUNCTIONING (CLOSED) COUNTRY LIQUOR SHOP, UNDER WEST TRIPURA, DISTRICT. | It is hereby notified for general information that licenses are proposed to be offered for settlement of retail vend of non-functioning (closed) 06 (six) nos. Country Liquor Shop (2ND call) under West Tripura, District through “e-tender” method for the two financial year 1″ April, 2026 to 31″ March, 2028 under the provision of Rules 154 read with Rules 22 and Rule 29A of the Tripura Excise Rules, 1990 (as amended time to time). Subject to certain terms and condition through e-procurement website of the Tripura. | 27/02/2026 | 03/03/2026 | |
| NOTICE INVITING TENDER (DNIT) FOR THE SETTLEMENT OF RETAIL VEND OF NON-FUNCTIONING (CLOSED)07 NOS. COUNTRY LIQUOR SHOP (1) call) | DETAILS NOTICE INVITING TENDER (DNIT) FOR THE SETTLEMENT OF RETAIL VEND OF NON-FUNCTIONING (CLOSED)07 NOS. COUNTRY LIQUOR SHOP (1) call) FOR THE TWO FINANCIAL YEAR 2026-27 & 2027-2028 UNDER WEST TRIPURA DISTRICT | 27/01/2026 | 18/02/2026 | |
| SHORT NOTICE INVITING TENDER On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned hereby invites sealed quotation of rate from the resourceful Supplier Vendor for supply of GCI sheets in connection with Mte of AWCs in various VCs under Mandwi RD Blo | On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned hereby invites sealed quotation of rate from the resourceful Supplier Vendor for supply of GCI sheets in connection with Mte of AWCs in various VCs under Mandwi RD Block.
